message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 234 migrate final 7 wezterm sites — WezTerm surface 28/28 cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

**MILESTONE**: closes the wezterm direct-call surface migration in
frankenterm/main.rs. All 28 ambient wezterm calls now use cx-first
entry points.

Final 7 sites migrated this tick:
1. L24653 human get-text: `get_text_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, escapes)`
2. L24738 workspace workflow-dry-run: `get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane)`
3. L24764 workspace workflow-run pane-verify: `list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
4. L25341 workspace-restore render: `list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
5. L26481 human commit pane-lookup: `get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
6. L27034 plan-commit pane-lookup: `get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
7. L35510 resolve_real_tx_runtime backend probe:
   `list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification:
- `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
- `grep -n 'wezterm\.list_panes()\|wezterm\.get_pane(\|wezterm\.get_text(\|wezterm\.send_text('`
  returns ZERO hits in main.rs (was 28 at tick 230 start)

## WezTerm surface complete: 28/28 sites cx-first

Tick-level breakdown:
- tick 230: 4 sites (policy-input, preflight, mux-ready, batch-text)
- tick 231: 6 sites (robot state/get-text/send)
- tick 232: 6 sites (wait-for, workflow-run RPC, doctor)
- tick 233: 5 sites (ls, show, human-send dry/verify)
- tick 234: 7 sites (human get-text, workspace, commit, tx-runtime)

**Total ft-xbnl0.2.3 session: 48 ticks (187-234).**

Combined cross-crate migration through tick 234:
- WorkflowRunner: 6 sites (ticks 224/226)
- NotificationPipeline: 1 site (tick 225)
- IpcClient: 7 sites (ticks 227/228)
- CassClient: 3 sites (ticks 227/229)
- WeztermInterface: 28 sites (ticks 230-234)

**45 total cross-crate caller sites migrated to cx-first.**

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
